description: arXiv:2512.05518v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Open-source Large Language Models (LLMs) play a critical role in the democratization of AI, yet their "open" nature introduces more avenues for malicious actors to misuse them for harmful purposes. A frustratingly easy but powerful technique known as the prefilling attack has been shown to effectively circumvent the safety alignment of f...
author: Jason Vega, Gagandeep Singh
